case_title: THOMAS PENA VS. ARACELY ALVAREZ ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-29-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-29-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF THOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY IRENE PENA. DEFENDANTS ARACELY ALVAREZ AND MELANIE CARRILLO ARE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
